positive: A stylized, abstract celestial map depicting interlocking constellations and glowing nebulae. The main subject features a central, crescent-shaped moon surrounded by delicate, glowing zodiac patterns formed by elegant, thin lines and geometric star clusters. The color palette is deep indigo, sapphire blue, and ethereal gold, with subtle accents of turquoise. The composition is highly symmetrical and centered, designed for maximum impact on fabric. Use a clean, high-contrast silhouette style with minimalist depth. The style should blend Art Deco geometry with modern scientific illustration, ensuring sharp lines and perfect repeatability. Vector illustration quality, crisp details, suitable for screen printing.
